title: Hormel Could Be A Safe Haven In Turbulent Markets
text: Hormel Foods has proven to be a safe haven for investors during times of low consumer confidence in the past 20 years. Although macroeconomic headwinds, including elevated commodity prices, may hurt HRL's business as well, we believe the firm is well-positioned to outperform the broader market.

title: Hormel Foods (HRL) Gains From Capacity Expansion, Costs High
text: Hormel Foods (HRL) is boosting business through capacity expansion and strategic acquisitions. Additionally, higher pricing has been aiding amid elevated costs.

title: Rising Recession Risk: These Companies Could Actually Benefit
text: As difficult as the first half of 2022 has been for most businesses, there are a few that have managed to deliver positive returns to their shareholders. Here we highlight four companies that tend to benefit from recessions and that have delivered positive returns to shareholders in the first half of the year.

title: Hormel Foods (HRL) Benefits From Brand Strength, Hurt by Costs
text: Hormel Foods (HRL) benefits from brand strength, improved foodservice business and higher pricing. However, input cost inflation is a concern.
